titleStmt.title: SII 16.281: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 281. (A.R. No. 806 of 1922.) VALLŪRU, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the maṇḍapa before the Veṇugōpālasvāmin temple.
The inscription is dated Śaka 14[9]5 (current), Āṅgīrasa, Āshāḍha śu. 11 corresponding to 1572 A.D., June 22, Sunday.

It states that on the representation of Bhāgavatula Raṅgama of Ātrēya-gōtra that the deed of grant for 2 puṭṭis of land given to him by the king on the date mentioned above having been stolen by thieves, the king was pleased to grant the deed again three months later on Āśvija śu. 10, Thursday. The grant land situated in Vallūru was re-measured in the presence of the village officers and a new inscription recording the re-grant of the land set up by Aḍapa Nāgappa-nāyaka, the kāryakarta of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1495 Agu
nēṁṭi Āṁggirasa saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha
śu 11 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara vīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁgga
dēvamahārāyalu Ayyavāri kāryaka¨rtta
laina Aḍapa nāgappanāIniṁgāru Ātrēyagōtrapa
nitrulaina bhāgavatula raṁgamaṁgāriki
Iccina bhūdānaśilāśāsanakramameṭlanna
nu Ātrēyagōtrōdbhavulaina śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa rāma
rāju śrīraṁggadēvamahārājulavāri pau
trulaina tirumaladēvamahārāyalavāri
putrulaina śrīraṁgarāyadēvamahārāyala

nēṁṭi Āṁggirasa saṁvatsa
ra Aśvija śu 10 gu śrīmahālakṣmī mahō
tsavapuṇyakālamaṁdunu rā
yalavāru mā vaśāna pāliṁcci Iyya
navadhariṁcina koṁḍavīṭidu¨rgaṁ rāmē
śvara[mu I]sthaḷānakuṁ jelli vaccē
Agrahārālalōnu vallūri grāmā
nanu nīku kēsaripāṭini kha 2 reṁḍupuṭla kṣē
tramu dhāravōśi dharmaśāsanaṁ pā
liṁcci Ā kṣētraṁ pāyaṁjūpa
mani mā pēranu rāyasaṁ pāliṁ
cca navadhariṁcināru ganaka Ā
rāyasaprakāraṁ sthalakaraṇāla rāca
karaṇāla sākṣigānu vrāyiṁccinakṣētraṁ kē

saripāṭini kha 2 reṁḍḍu puṭlakṣē
tramunnu vallūrigrāmānanu
kolipiṁcci pāyaṁjūpi Istimi
gākā yellavāru mīku pāliṁcina
dharmaśāsanamunnu māpēranu pāliṁcina
rāyasamunnu nīvaddavuṁḍaṁgānu doṁ
ggalu Ettuka pōyinārani mākuṁ
jepitiri ganaka tirumaladēva mahārā
yalavārikinni veṁgaḷājiAmmagārikinni puṇyaṁ
gānu rāyalavāru nīke pāliṁccina dharmaśāsa
na prakārānanu I kṣētrānanu śilāśāsa
namu prāyiṁci pratiṣṭhacēstimi ganaka [I]
sarvamānyakṣētraṁvalna paṁḍina
nānādhānyamunnu nānāphalālu
nnu brāṁhmala mēḍipāḷla dhā

syaṁ poṁgānu dhānya kōriki vaccina
dhānyaṁ veṁggaḷāji Aṁmmavāriki puṁṇya
ṁgānu nitya cēyiṁcina vu kha 3 kinni Ū
¨rjitaṁgānu dhānyaṁ Icci vēyiṁccina
vaivusna pariyaṁttaṁ
munnu yī maryādanu puṇyaṁ kā
Ā tōṁṭā Ā kṣētraṁ nī
vu ceṟuvuku dhāravōśi Iccināvu gana
ka [Ā] grāmaṁ brāhmalaku Ā kṣētraṁ phalālu
yicci yēṁṭa yiṁcakaṭṭaḍa cē
stimi ganaka yī dharmānaku yavvaru
vighātaṁ śāyatalaṁcinānu
pitāmātṛvadhaśēśi gōbrāhmala
sahā vadhaśēśina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . I
vrittiki cellina bhūdāna śilāśāsanamu 1
śrīkṛṣṇā¨rpaṇamastu .

svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta va
suṁddharā . ṣaṣṭi¨rvaruṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattā
nupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa sva
dattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . 2 .
Digital edition of SII 16.281 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
